productDisplayName: Puma Men Pop Art Black Flip Flops
description: This absolutely stylish pair of Pop Art flip flops from puma makes for a fantastic casual wear. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet while the minimalist design of the cat adds to it a classy look.UpperTwill straps in a thong style, with a padded toe separatorSoft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfortCat logo at the heel and branding at the toe region for styleOutsoleTPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionCareWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
